name: copyfail2_electric_boogaloo_fix
description: A temporary mitigation against copy_fail variant (copyfail2_electric_boogaloo) - Unprivileged Linux LPE via xfrm ESP-in-UDP MSG_SPLICE_PAGES no-COW fast path. Page-cache write into any readable file. Overwrites a nologin line in /etc/passwd with sick::0:0:…:/:/bin/bash and sus into it. Same class as Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431), different subsystem.
